title: Rhythm: 3-letter words
description: Repeat words with a steady beat
text: cat cat cat dog dog dog see see see run run run fun fun fun the the the and and and yes yes yes

character_tips.anna: Words like song verses — three times each.
character_tips.knopych: 🥁 RHYTHM TIME! Same words, steady beat!
character_tips.klavochka: Like a little song, my dear 🎶
